# Migration

Run source-system migration workflows.

## kiri migrate

Source-system migration.

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri migrate [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

None.

### Subcommands

- [`kiri migrate analyze`](#kiri-migrate-analyze) - Introspect MSSQL → write `sources/*.yml`...
- [`kiri migrate emit-fk-ddl`](#kiri-migrate-emit-fk-ddl) - Emit foreign-key constraint DDL for every...
- [`kiri migrate from-bimlflex`](#kiri-migrate-from-bimlflex) - Migrate a legacy BimlFlex repo (requires...
- [`kiri migrate lint-models`](#kiri-migrate-lint-models) - Apply the 5-layer medallion layer-policy...
- [`kiri migrate sp`](#kiri-migrate-sp) - Classify + translate one T-SQL stored...
- [`kiri migrate translate-tsql`](#kiri-migrate-translate-tsql) - Run only the deterministic T-SQL → Spark...
- [`kiri migrate verify`](#kiri-migrate-verify) - Run Databricks pre-deploy infrastructure...
- [`kiri migrate verify-names`](#kiri-migrate-verify-names) - Verbatim name-preservation gate

### kiri migrate analyze

Introspect MSSQL → write `sources/*.yml`...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri migrate analyze [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--source-target` | Named MSSQL target profile | no | mssql |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Write sources YAML here | no | sources/mssql.yml |  |
| `--owner` | Owner email for the generated source | no | data-platform@example.com |  |
| `--domain` | Domain tag for the generated source | no | migration |  |

### kiri migrate emit-fk-ddl

Emit foreign-key constraint DDL for every...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri migrate emit-fk-ddl [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile from kiri.yml | no |  |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Write the FK constraint DDL .sql artefact here (default stdout). | no |  |  |

### kiri migrate sp

Classify + translate one T-SQL stored...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri migrate sp [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--procedure` | Fully qualified procedure name, e.g. dbo.usp_LoadShifts | yes |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--source-target` | Named MSSQL target profile in kiri.yml (the source DB) | no | mssql |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Write artefact to file | no |  |  |

### kiri migrate verify

Run Databricks pre-deploy infrastructure...

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri migrate verify [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile from kiri.yml | no |  |  |
| `--catalog` | Override catalog (defaults to profile.catalog) | no |  |  |
| `--landing-url` | ADLS Gen2 landing URL to verify external location for | no |  |  |

### kiri migrate verify-names

Verbatim name-preservation gate

### Usage

```text
Usage: kiri migrate verify-names [OPTIONS]
```

### Arguments

None.

### Options

| Name | Description | Required | Default | Choices |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--contract` | Path to the ODCS contract YAML to check. | yes |  |  |
| `--schema` | Live schema/database the table sits in. | yes |  |  |
| `--target`, `-t` | Named profile from kiri.yml | no |  |  |
| `--project`, `-p` | Project directory | no |  |  |
| `--catalog` | Live catalog (label only); defaults to profile.catalog. | no |  |  |
| `--output`, `-o` | Write the JSON report here (default stdout). | no |  |  |
